name: Show Direct Dependencies
title: Show Direct Dependencies
description: Show the ontologies the selected ontology directly imports (1-hop OUTBOUND on `imports`).
queryText:
WITH ontology_registry, imports
FOR node IN @nodes
  FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('ontology_registry', node)
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node imports
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Direct Dependents
title: Show Direct Dependents
description: Show ontologies that directly import the selected one (1-hop INBOUND on `imports`).
queryText:
WITH ontology_registry, imports
FOR node IN @nodes
  FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('ontology_registry', node)
  FOR v, e IN 1..1 INBOUND node imports
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 100
    RETURN e

name: Show Full Dependency Tree
title: Show Full Dependency Tree
description: Expand the full transitive dependency closure (10-hop ANY) anchored on the selected ontology.
queryText:
WITH ontology_registry, imports
FOR node IN @nodes
  FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('ontology_registry', node)
  FOR v, e IN 1..10 ANY node GRAPH 'ontology_imports'
    OPTIONS { uniqueEdges: 'global', bfs: true }
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    LIMIT 500
    RETURN e
